name: Hakka Chinese
notes: Hakka Chinese (Hak-kâ-ngî). The grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified and NO logographic map is claimed: Chinese characters do not encode pronunciation segmentally, so a character → IPA table is out of scope for this engine. INPUT CONTRACT: as `zh` requires pinyin, a future Hakka spec would require romanised input in Pha̍k-fa-sṳ (the Hakka missionary romanisation, the Hakka counterpart of Pe̍h-ōe-jī) — or the Taiwanese Hakka Romanization System — not Han characters. Hakka is also strongly dialect-split (Sixian, Hailu, Meixian…), each with its own tone system. Metadata only.
